headline: These 3 Semiconductor Stocks Just Got a Bullish Nod From Citi. Buy the Dip.

headline: Anthropic Is Worth $965 Billion and Still Needs Google to Pay Its Rent
summary: Anthropic signs 1GW of US data center leases and asks Google, its top rival, to guarantee payments before its IPO.

headline: CNBC Daily Open: The buyers are back ahead of SpaceX IPO
summary: SpaceX will start trading on the Nasdaq today after raising $75 billion in its record-breaking IPO, as Wall Street's rally resumes on Iran peace hopes.
